local_decisions_finalized.decision: Testing strategy for React Native components
local_decisions_finalized.choice: Use @testing-library/react with react-native-web alias and jsdom environment instead of @testing-library/react-native.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Storybook renders components via react-native-web; web testing aligns with the executable visual contract and avoids React Native Testing Library's native-only environment assumptions.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Placeholder components expose typed props as object rather than empty interfaces.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: TypeScript ESLint v9 rejects empty interfaces; object is the semantically correct 'any object' placeholder for future expansion.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Icon is a placeholder that renders an accessible text fallback. No concrete icon library is selected.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E3 scope is component framework only; icon provider selection is an application-level concern.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Use Platform.select to apply boxShadow on web and shadow*/elevation on native.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: react-native-web deprecates shadow* style props; the theme's shadowMode still drives whether shadow is rendered.

local_decisions_finalized.decision: ESLint project config for non-src files
local_decisions_finalized.choice: Created tsconfig.eslint.json and packages/ui/eslint.config.js override to include .storybook and vite.config.ts in type-aware linting.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Shared config's project: true cannot resolve files outside tsconfig.json's include; local override preserves build tsconfig integrity.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Added icon semantic color slot populated across light/dark/highContrast themes.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Icon placeholder needs theme-aware color; no explicit icon color existed in DS-001/DS-005.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Removed @testing-library/react-native and react-test-renderer after switching to @testing-library/react.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Eliminates unused dependencies and keeps the testing stack aligned with the web-first Storybook harness.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added tsconfig.eslint.json and local eslint.config.js override not in the approved plan.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Implementation detail required to make type-aware ESLint work for Storybook and Vite config files without polluting the build tsconfig.
